content.preview: [WHERE-HIT] ROIN.FullEager.RO_LRO_D (kind: lemma) * In [lemmas or axioms]: (* FullEager.RO_LRO_D *) local lemma RO_LRO_D: forall (D0(G : RO) <: RO_Distinguisher{-RO, -FRO}), (forall (_ : nonce * C.counter), is_lossless dpoly_in) => equiv[ D0(RO).distinguish ~ D0(LRO).distinguish : (glob D0){1} = (glob D0){2} /\ RO.m{1} = RO.m{2} /\ arg{1} = arg{2} ==> res{1} = res{2} /\ (glob D0){1} = (glob D0){2}].
